body:
<!-- Thanks so much for your PR, your contribution is appreciated! ❤️ -->

- [x] I have followed (at least) the [PR section of the contributing guide](https://github.com/mui/base-ui/blob/HEAD/CONTRIBUTING.md#sending-a-pull-request).

Closes #2253

https://deploy-preview-2269--base-ui.netlify.app/experiments/navigation-menu

In the experiment, the content doesn't have any transitions of its own (except for Collapsible) - what this is testing is the ability for the popup to transition its size when content is inserted, along with the ability for content to drive the transition itself instead of the Popup (Collapsible). This PR also fixes the `Positioner` dimensions not being updated (which doesn't end up affecting `height` changes, but does affect `width` changes)

For inlined content, the inline viewport never gets unmounted like with popups

___

## Breaking change

Ensure the popup's `width` is set to `var(--popup-width)` unconditionally (without the media query) on the `.Popup` class.

```diff
.Popup {
-  width: max-content;
-  @media (min-width: 500px) {
-    width: var(--popup-width);
-  }
+  width: var(--popup-width);
```

labels.name: type: new feature
labels.description: Expand the scope of the product to solve a new problem.

labels.name: breaking change
labels.description: Introduces changes that are not backward compatible.

labels.name: component: navigation menu
labels.description: Changes related to the navigation menu component.

title: [navigation menu] Support inlined nesting
